messages.body:
CAR-T is moving beyond cancer, and the next frontier is autoimmune disease. 
 
Legend Biotech's first in vivo data shows the modality maturing. The names actually positioned for the shift are smaller: Cabaletta, Kyverna, and Nkarta.

messages.body:
$LEGN 6/6

5/6 complete elimation

$LEGN 

“Rather than engineering cells in a lab and reinfusing them into patients as with conventional CAR-T therapy, the in vivo therapies deliver the instructions for fighting cancer or autoimmune disease directly into patients’ bodies without the need for preconditioning. The hope is that these treatments would be easier and cheaper to make, as well as more widely accessible to patients — all while maintaining the transformative effects seen with current CAR-T therapies.”

data.text: “Rather than engineering cells in a lab and reinfusing them into patients as with conventional CAR-T therapy, the in vivo therapies deliver the instructions for fighting cancer or autoimmune disease directly into patients’ bodies without the need for preconditioning. The hope is that these treatments would be easier and cheaper to make, as well as more widely accessible to patients — all while maintaining the transformative effects seen with current CAR-T therapies.”

messages.body:
The XBI is off 6.55% the last 2 days, the 17th biggest 2 day loss in the XBI since 12/31/21 (list attached). Recall in May 2022 the XBI lost 20.1% over 6 days. 
 
Attached are all commercial-stage (oncology & non-oncology) bios who lost more than 10% in share price over the last 2 days...and the 2 winners. Oncology MCs over $500MM & non-oncology over $750MM 
 
$LEGN has clearly been the best performing commercial-stage bio over the last 2 days after reporting stunning data in solid tumors this morning (not MM). 
 
$ETON is a surprise considering 2 summers ago ETON traded for less than $5.00 a share. There may still be an incredible story here as ETON only trades for 2.0X FY29 (Year 4) consensus with as diversified a product portfolio as they come. 
 
$LXRX traded for $1.25 a share just 4 months ago. 
 
$PGEN traded for $1.85 last summer before its first FDA approval 
 
$LQDA still trades at 3.0X FY29 (Year 4) consensus but otherwise has been one of the strongest in the peer group ($12.00 last summer

message.body:
$LEGN

Biotech talking heads wrote off $LEGN , and they're still in disbelief that an ex vivo CAR-T company could suddenly emerge as the leader in in vivo CAR-T, too. They must be scrambling to check their sources: "Is this for real? How did we miss it?"

Look no further. Here is the "who’s who" team of leading experts who agreed to join the $LEGN Scientific Advisory Board after previewing the lymphoma study data just 4 weeks ago!

https://investors.legendbiotech.com/news-releases/news-release-details/legend-biotech-expands-scientific-advisory-expertise-inform

trends.summary: Marvell Technology is experiencing significant volatility and massive trading volume following comments from Nvidias CEO suggesting the company could reach a trillion-dollar valuation. The community remains sharply divided, with bulls pointing to the potential of the AI networking and data center infrastructure sector, while bears express skepticism, labeling the move a hyped-up pump and expressing concerns over potential regulatory scrutiny and disconnected fundamentals.
